untranslatable_reason: The signal references 'annualized roll return of 3 percent' which is a futures-specific metric (rolling contract returns) not available in the standard indicator set. The exact threshold value is marked AUTHOR_SILENT. The 'Alexander Filter' appears to be a proprietary indicator not in the allowed list. Interpreted daily return threshold as 0.03 (3%) but this may not match the intended annualized roll return logic.
translation_notes: Converted to daily returns comparison since 'returns' is the closest available indicator to daily return calculation. The source mentions a 3% threshold applied to TU (10-year Treasury futures) with results from 2009-2012 (Sharpe 2.1, APR 2.5%), but the exact threshold parameterization and exit logic are not specified in the excerpt. Exit condition reversed to negative returns as a reasonable default since AUTHOR_SILENT.
